description: Source-side editable public driver command map. Contains Inovance SV630N profile for VPS public upload; product runtime consumes the boot RAM drive-profile snapshot prepared from the downloaded board profile. SV630N default encoder_bits is 18 and runtime derives count fields from the final bit; drive-owner fields may include electronic-gear and absolute multi-turn metadata, absolute multi-turn/single-turn/absolute-position read commands, raw multi-turn counter modulus metadata, and explicit drive count-domain command declarations.

drive.abort_motion.failure_message_cn: 汇川 SV630N 驱动侧中止运动对象未确认，停止只能走已验证的上层停止链路。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。

drive.backup_parameters.failure_message_cn: 驱动参数备份对象/流程未确认。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。

drive.clear_encoder_zero.failure_message_cn: SV630N ESI 未确认编码器清零/位置预设对象；0x2018:05 仅属于位置比较功能，设0 必须 fail-closed。
notes: ESI contains 0x2018:05 Current Position As Zero under Position Comparison, but it is not accepted as a drive encoder zero/position preset command.
Do not enable until vendor confirms exact zeroing object, write value, and readback proof.

drive.clear_multi_turn.failure_message_cn: SV630N 多圈清零对象和安全时序未确认，禁止执行驱动多圈清零。
notes: The software count-domain unwrap/checkpoint path can still run without drive physical multi-turn clear.
Hardware multi-turn clear must be a separate verified maintenance feature, not an automatic rebase fallback, fault reset, axis zero, or homing step.
If later enabled, the command must invalidate and rebuild local checkpoint in the same position-basis transaction.

drive.homing_start.failure_message_cn: 汇川 SV630N 驱动侧回零启动对象未确认，禁止驱动侧 homing。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。

drive.homing_status.failure_message_cn: 汇川 SV630N 驱动侧回零状态对象未确认，不能作为回零闭环证据。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。
读取 0x1018:01 vendor_id、0x1018:02 product_code、0x1018:03 revision、0x1018:04 serial。
model/name 来自 EtherCAT 从站描述或 slaves -v 里的设备名。

drive.preset_position.failure_message_cn: SV630N 位置预设对象、写入值和读回验证未确认，禁止执行驱动位置预设。
notes: 0x200D:01 in this profile is software reset only and must not be reused as position preset.
0x2018:05 appears in ESI position comparison context and is not accepted as encoder zero or position preset.
Enable only after vendor manual, profile sequence, stopped gate proof, readback proof, and position-basis checkpoint transaction are available.

drive.quick_stop.failure_message_cn: 快停控制字序列需按现场安全链验证后才能启用。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。
SV630N 0x200B:71 Number of turns of absolute encode.

drive.read_abs_position.compose_formula: without zero basis: raw_turn * encoder_single_turn_counts + raw_single_turn; with zero basis: zero_abs_counts + delta_turns(raw_turn, zero_abs_turns, raw_modulus) * encoder_single_turn_counts + (raw_single_turn - zero_abs_single_turn_counts), delta_turns=((raw_turn-zero_abs_turns+raw_modulus/2) mod raw_modulus)-raw_modulus/2
drive.read_abs_position.compose_reference: zero_model.zero_abs_turns/zero_abs_single_turn_counts/zero_abs_counts when available; raw composition only before zero basis exists
notes: SV630N public map exposes absolute-position as an Adapter-derived absolute multi-turn value from 0x200B:71 and 0x200B:72.
0x200B:71 BitSize=16 only defines a 65536-turn raw counter wrap period; it is not the hardware physical safety/alarm limit.
If a future drive provides a direct absolute object, the mapping must declare its actual result width and value type instead of composing it.
SV630N 0x200B:72 Single feedback position of absolute encode.
CiA402 实际位置。
CiA402 实际速度；具体工程单位由轴配置换算。

drive.read_bus_state.failure_message_cn: EtherCAT 总线状态由扫描/主站状态提供，不在本 SDO 映射表内直接声明。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。
SV630N ESI declares 0x200B:0x19 Phase current valid value as UINT ro and TxPDO-mappable.
H0b.24 200b-19h 相电流有效值，0.0A~6553.5A，不可更改。
该项是只读监视量，不参与运动门禁，也不写入驱动。
SV630N ESI declares 0x200B:0x1B Bus voltage as UINT ro and TxPDO-mappable.
H0b.26 200b-1Bh 母线电压值，0.0V~6553.5V，不可更改。
该项是只读监视量，不参与运动门禁，也不写入驱动。
ESI DT6091 confirms both gear ratio subitems are readable.

drive.read_encoder_multiturn_limit.failure_message_cn: 驱动未提供已验证的多圈物理报警上限读回对象；ESI 位宽只能作为计数器回绕周期。
notes: Enable only if vendor documentation and readback proof identify a real hardware physical alarm/safety limit object.
Do not map ESI BitSize or raw counter modulus to this command.

drive.read_encoder_resolution.failure_message_cn: SV630N 当前 ESI 未声明编码器单圈分辨率读回对象，旋转轴 count 域必须阻断并等待厂家对象或实机读回证据。
notes: Project count-domain design requires dynamic encoder resolution verification before Crev is trusted.
No 0x608F entry was found in the current SV630N ESI evidence set; do not mark supported until vendor/manual/real-drive readback proves the object.
Profile encoder_bits is the default bit; runtime derives drive_internal_counts_per_motor_rev and encoder_single_turn_counts from the final bit.
CiA402 error code。
Inovance auxiliary fault/alarm code readback used only for diagnostics when 603Fh is nonzero.
CiA402 following error actual value。
CiA402 digital inputs；具体限位/home 位定义仍需按 SV630N 参数手册确认。

drive.read_limit_config.failure_message_cn: 驱动侧限位读对象未确认。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。
CiA402 模式显示。
CiA402 标准状态字。
SV630N ESI declares 0x200B:0x1C Module temperature as UINT ro and TxPDO-mappable.
H0b.27 200b-1Ch 模块温度值，-20℃~200℃，不可更改。
该项是只读监视量，不参与运动门禁，也不写入驱动。
CiA402 torque actual value，显示前需按驱动额定值解释。
CiA402 fault reset bit 7；执行后必须读回 statusword fault bit 已清除。
ESI SV630N_EOE_1Axis_03713.xml declares 0x2002 subindex 0x20 as Parameter initialization, UINT16, rw.
SV630ND function manual H02.31 / 2002-20h defines system parameter initialization: 0=no operation, 1=restore factory settings, 2=clear fault records.
SV630N user manual notes H02.31=1 restores factory settings except H00/H01 parameter groups and requires stopping the drive; board-side verification is still required before claiming runtime success.
Do not use 0x200D:01 Software reset as factory-default restore.

object.name: Parameter initialization / H02.31 system parameter initialization

drive.restore_parameters.failure_message_cn: 驱动参数恢复对象/流程未确认。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。

drive.save_parameters.failure_message_cn: SV630N ESI 未声明参数保存对象或保存签名，禁止持久化写入。
notes: ESI search found no CiA402 0x1010 Store Parameters or clear vendor save command.
Do not enable save until vendor confirms object, signature value, and safe timing.
ESI DT6091 declares 0x6091:01 Motor revolutions and 0x6091:02 Shaft revolutions as UDINT rw.
写入必须先写分子再写分母，并逐项读回一致；不允许运动中写入。
ESI SV630N_EOE_1Axis_03713.xml declares 0x200D:01 as Software reset under Auxiliary Function Parameters.
This is a drive software reset trigger, not parameter initialization or factory-default restore.

drive.verify_position_basis.failure_message_cn: SV630N 位置基准验证对象未确认，等效重设不能标记成功。
notes: Reading 0x6064 actual position alone is not enough to prove drive position-basis generation after a physical preset or multi-turn clear.
Enable only after the profile declares readback objects for current basis, multi-turn state, or vendor confirmation bit.
只允许上层按 CiA402 状态机发显式控制字，不允许驱动表内隐式 enable。

drive.write_limit_config.failure_message_cn: 驱动侧限位写对象未确认，禁止写入。
notes: 必须补厂家手册、SDO 读写证据和读回校验后才能改为 supported=true。
写模式必须在无运动并由上层 gate 确认可切换时执行。

drive.write_position_offset.failure_message_cn: SV630N 厂家位置偏置对象未确认，禁止写入驱动侧位置偏置。
notes: Settings-page axis zero remains software count-domain zero anchor only and must not call drive-side offset writes.
Vendor position offset writes mutate the physical position basis and require explicit maintenance workflow plus checkpoint transaction.

profiles.identity_source: SV630N EtherCAT ESI identity plus public/manual evidence. Generic CiA402 commands are kept; SV630N 0x200B read-only monitor objects are enabled; unsafe zero/save/reset vendor write commands remain fail-closed. Count-domain static encoder fields were added for rotary equivalent-angle design; dynamic readback remains fail-closed until the vendor object is proven. Current machine default encoder_bits is 18; 23-bit counts must come only from an explicit axis manual override or another explicit profile.

profiles.identity_source: SV630N EtherCAT ESI identity plus public/manual evidence. Generic CiA402 commands are kept; SV630N 0x200B read-only monitor objects are enabled; unsafe zero/save/reset vendor write commands remain fail-closed. Count-domain static encoder fields were added for rotary equivalent-angle design; dynamic readback remains fail-closed until the vendor object is proven. Current machine default encoder_bits is 18; runtime still honors a persisted axis manual bit override.

source_evidence: 8ax驱动映射表/汇川SV630N/docs/SV630ND系列伺服功能手册-CN-A02.PDF
